codeReview.summary: Current HEAD still satisfies the feature contract. The manifest gate is promoted to the full suite, supply-chart invalid params are now rejected before returning the fixture envelope, and the simple/coins smoke harness expectations match the current intentional API contracts.

summary: Reviewed the completed feature against current HEAD, its handoff commit, transcript skeleton, and mission guidance. I found no blocking or non-blocking implementation defects within scope; the feature’s contract remains intact on the branch and no additional shared-state gaps were evidenced by this review.
